scripts.build: node --check extension/teacher-lexicon.js && node --check extension/lexicon.js && node --check extension/content.js && node --check extension/popup.js && node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const manifest=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('extension/manifest.json','utf8')); for (const size of ['16','32','48','128']) { for (const path of [manifest.icons?.[size], manifest.action?.default_icon?.[size]]) { if (!path || !fs.existsSync('extension/'+path)) throw new Error('missing icon '+size); } } console.log('manifest ok')"
